race.comment: BAJARIA (10) finds a much more suitable race having contested a much stronger BM64 at Caulfield Heath last time and struggling. The two runs prior to start the campaign read nicely for this with a pair of runner up finishes and anything like that sees her go close. Wary of SCALABLE (9) who ran a good race first up at Pakenham when beaten a nose. She's off 39 days here which is interesting but she should prove hard to hold out. FATTY FINN (1) won well enough in a dash home here last start to beat Just For Kicks comfortably, which we should get a guide to earlier. He can roll forward and give a sight again. DECANTED (7) is another second up but off a let up, struggling as favourite at Cranbourne on soft ground. He can improve sharply here. SO YOU EXCEL (12) won her maiden narrowly here last time out and has claims off that.
